description: Identify the top-performing oil lamps available for purchase in 2021 based on customer ratings, sales volume, and product features.
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive evaluation of the best oil lamps on the market in 2021, with a focus on quality, durability, and performance. Relevance is determined by how well a product is ranked in the comparison—considering factors such as customer reviews, number of units sold, fuel efficiency, design, and safety features. The user may be interested in using the lamp for ambient lighting, outdoor use, or as a nostalgic decorative piece, and wants to make an informed decision based on expert and user-driven insights.

title: Car Rental in Madeira
description: What is the best way to rent a car in Madeira, considering cost, insurance, vehicle type, and delivery options?
narrative: A traveler planning a trip to Madeira seeks comprehensive guidance on renting a car to maximize flexibility and value. They want to compare major rental agencies and local providers like Madeira Car Booking, focusing on transparent pricing, inclusion of full insurance (especially without deductible), vehicle suitability for mountainous terrain (avoiding small engines on steep roads), and the convenience of free delivery to their accommodation. The user is particularly concerned about hidden fees, the necessity of purchasing additional insurance, and the overall cost-effectiveness of pre-booking online. Relevance is determined by documents that provide clear comparisons of rental costs, insurance coverage, vehicle recommendations, delivery policies, and user experiences with specific providers on the island.

title: Sprouted Potato Safety
description: What are the risks and safety guidelines for consuming sprouted potatoes?
narrative: The user is seeking clear, evidence-based guidance on whether sprouted potatoes are safe to eat, particularly in light of common warnings about solanine toxicity. They want to understand the actual health risks associated with consuming sprouted potatoes, including how much must be consumed to cause harm, and practical steps for safely preparing them (e.g., removing sprouts and green parts). The user may be a home cook or food consumer who has encountered sprouted potatoes and is uncertain whether to discard them or risk consuming them. Relevance is determined by documents that address solanine content, toxicity thresholds, and safe preparation methods for sprouted potatoes, especially those that clarify misconceptions and provide actionable advice.

title: Back-to-Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the conditions and eligibility criteria for receiving the back-to-work bonus in France, particularly for individuals transitioning from RSA or SSA to employment?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed, accurate information about the back-to-work bonus (also known as the 'prime retour à l'emploi') in France, specifically focusing on eligibility requirements for individuals who have been receiving RSA (Revenu de Solidarité Active) or SSA (Allocation Spécifique de Solidarité) and are now returning to work. The user wants to understand whether they qualify based on employment duration (e.g., minimum 4 months of work), contract type (CDI, CDD), hourly work requirements (e.g., 78 hours/month), and whether the bonus is still available given that it was discontinued after 2015. The user also needs to know the application process, required documentation (e.g., employment contract, payslips), and the correct administrative body (Pôle Emploi or CAF) to contact. Relevance is determined by documents that confirm the existence, conditions, and application procedures for the bonus, including clarifications on its discontinuation and replacement by APRE (Personalized Back-to-Work Assistance), as well as examples of real cases and official policy changes.
